description: Descriptive weighted heterogeneity decomposition for within-IFN IFN-gamma effects
full_ifn_partition_summary_note: This inverse-variance weighted mean is used only for descriptive weighted-Q partitions in this file. The inferential guarded DL/HKSJ pooled IFN-gamma effect is reported separately in outputs/canonical_v8/hartung_knapp_expanded.json.
interpretation: Within-IFN I² of 0.9252 for the IFN-gamma core is descriptively partitioned into: tissue explains 73.2%, etiology explains 55.5%, platform explains 33.3%. Combined moderators explain 90.8% of total within-IFN Q. Because k=11 and the combined partition contains sparse cells, this is a descriptive heterogeneity decomposition rather than a definitive inferential meta-regression.
